chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constt: Petition No.S-06 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on CMA No.31/2024 2. For hearing of main case 19-5-2025 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioner, nor has any intimation been received and same was the position on the last two consecutive dates, which shows that the petitioner is not interested to proceed with the matter. As a result thereof, instant petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Naveed Ali
